2026-0252
2026-03-25ESDCDepartment of Employment and Social Development ActAppointment of a regional coordinator of the Employment Insurance Board of AppealAppointment of Manon Sauvé of Prévost, Quebec, to be a regional coordinator of the Employment Insurance Board of Appeal, to hold office during pleasure on a full-time basis for a term of five years, effective April 1, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Employment and Social Development Act
subject: Appointment of a regional coordinator of the Employment Insurance Board of Appeal
precis: Appointment of Manon Sauvé of Prévost, Quebec, to be a regional coordinator of the Employment Insurance Board of Appeal, to hold office during pleasure on a full-time basis for a term of five years, effective April 1, 2026.
